title: TMXTribe - Rekt
relevance_summary: Unverified contract with flawed logic allowing systematic drainage of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves unverified contracts with suspicious minting, staking, and swapping logic.
prevention.trigger: UNVERIFIED_CONTRACT -> mint() && stake() && swap() in sequence

red_flags: No checks or balances in unverified contract logic
summary: TMXTribe experienced a systematic fund drainage due to flawed logic in an unverified contract. Attackers repeatedly minted, staked, swapped, and unstaked tokens over 36 hours. A guard could have blocked transactions involving unverified contracts with suspicious logic.
